tasks.subject: Task 0: DB migration + sqlc for personal_access_token
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the PAT table and its sqlc queries; regenerate pkg/db.

**Files:** db/migrations/023_personal_access_token.sql, db/queries/personal_access_token.sql, pkg/db (generated).

**Verify:** `sqlc generate && go build -tags nodynamic ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["db/migrations/023_personal_access_token.sql", "db/queries/personal_access_token.sql", "pkg/db"], "verifyCommand": "sqlc generate && go build -tags nodynamic ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["migration 023 up/down clean", "sqlc generates 5 PAT queries", "go build -tags nodynamic ./... clean"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: pat crypto package (generate/hash/hint)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A leaf package producing PAT plaintext, its SHA-256 hash, and a non-secret hint — no DB dependency.

**Files:** pkg/credential/pat/pat.go, pkg/credential/pat/pat_test.go.

**Verify:** `go test ./pkg/credential/pat/ -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/credential/pat/pat.go", "pkg/credential/pat/pat_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./pkg/credential/pat/ -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Generate returns prefixed raw + sha256 hash + hint", "HashToken deterministic == Generate hash", "Hint = prefix+ellipsis+last4"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Gateway PAT verify branch
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Accept Authorization: Bearer <PAT> at the forward-auth verify endpoint with terminal precedence; emit the always-on authoritative header set incl Remote-Scopes.

**Files:** pkg/protocol/oidc/forward_auth.go, pkg/protocol/oidc/forward_auth_test.go.

**Verify:** `go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/ -run ForwardAuth -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/protocol/oidc/forward_auth.go", "pkg/protocol/oidc/forward_auth_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/ -run ForwardAuth -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["writeIdentityHeaders always-emit 5 headers incl Remote-Scopes", "valid PAT 200 + headers", "invalid/disabled 401; unauthorized 403", "Bearer terminal precedence over cookie"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Self-service /me/tokens API
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Let a user create (sudo, plaintext once), list (no secret), and revoke their own PATs; audit create/revoke.

**Files:** pkg/audit/event.go, pkg/contract/auth.go, pkg/server/handle_me_tokens.go, pkg/server/handle_me_tokens_test.go, pkg/server/server.go.

**Verify:** `go test ./pkg/server/ -run Token -v && go build -tags nodynamic ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/audit/event.go", "pkg/contract/auth.go", "pkg/server/handle_me_tokens.go", "pkg/server/handle_me_tokens_test.go", "pkg/server/server.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./pkg/server/ -run Token -v && go build -tags nodynamic ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["create sudo-gated, plaintext once", "list has no secret, non-revoked only", "revoke owner-scoped + audit rows"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Dashboard Personal Access Tokens page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A /tokens page listing/revoking PATs and creating one via a reveal-once dialog; wired into router, sidebar, and both locales.

**Files:** dashboard/src/pages/TokensView.vue, dashboard/src/router/index.ts, dashboard/src/components/custom/AppSidebar.vue, dashboard/src/locales/en.ts, dashboard/src/locales/zh.ts.

**Verify:** `cd dashboard && npm run build && npm test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/src/pages/TokensView.vue", "dashboard/src/router/index.ts", "dashboard/src/components/custom/AppSidebar.vue", "dashboard/src/locales/en.ts", "dashboard/src/locales/zh.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd dashboard && npm run build && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["/tokens list+revoke", "create reveal-once dialog with save gate", "sidebar entry + en/zh parity"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Docs — forward-auth deployment + API
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document the PAT credential, Remote-Scopes, and the mandatory Traefik config (forward Remote-*; strip Authorization).

**Files:** docs/forward-auth.md, api.md.

**Verify:** `grep -n 'Remote-Scopes' docs/forward-auth.md api.md`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/forward-auth.md", "api.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n 'Remote-Scopes' docs/forward-auth.md api.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["forward-auth.md PAT section + verbatim boundary note + Traefik strip-Authorization", "api.md /me/tokens + verify Bearer 200/401/403"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Smoke coverage + full gate + dist commit
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prove the PAT path end-to-end against a live server, then run the full project gate and commit the rebuilt SPA bundle.

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Requested by the user in the current conversation (project convention: every cycle ends with SMOKE_EXIT=0 + committed dist). Do not close by walking around it or substituting a cheaper check; re-validate every acceptanceCriteria with captured output.

**Files:** cmd/smoke/main.go, pkg/webui/dist (generated).

**Verify:** `mise run ci && mise run ci:smoke` → both exit 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/smoke/main.go", "pkg/webui/dist"], "verifyCommand": "mise run ci && mise run ci:smoke", "acceptanceCriteria": ["smoke: PAT verify 200 + Remote-User + Remote-Scopes", "smoke: bad Bearer 401; app-restricted 403", "mise run ci exits 0 (no dist drift)", "mise run ci:smoke exits 0"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
